qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: ElementSearchController blind SQL injection permits low-privilege database exfiltration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same controller and root cause as the advisory: `ElementSearchController::actionSearch()` applies attacker-supplied `criteria` to the element query without the `ElementHelper::cleanseQueryCriteria()` guard added in the patch.

selected_finding.title: ElementSearchController blind SQL injection permits low-privilege database exfiltration

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the advisory’s exact vulnerable controller and missing guard, and the judge-side copied PoC proved the advisory impact by extracting the randomly generated admin username from the database using a non-admin control-panel account.
evidence: The advisory describes authenticated blind SQL injection in `ElementSearchController::actionSearch()` because the controller was missing the same criteria-stripping protection previously added elsewhere.

At vulnerable ref `32a54bd54eeaf906f96e0569358a9372a3c942f6`, `ElementSearchController::actionSearch()` accepts request `criteria` and calls `Craft::configure($query, Component::cleanseConfig($criteria));` without cleansing unsupported query attributes first.

Patch commit `e1a3dd669ae31491b86ad996e88a1d30d33d9a42` adds `ElementHelper::cleanseQueryCriteria($criteria)` immediately before `Craft::configure(...)`, matching the advisory’s missing-guard root cause.

Judge-side PoC log `/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_09365561/.judge/poc_runs/elementsearchcontroller-blind-sqli/run.log` shows `Granted accessCp to attacker01`, fourteen recovered characters, `EVOHUNT_SUCCESS recovered admin username: victim8abe4fa3`, and proof JSON with `baseline_result_count` 2 and `false_result_count` 0.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC created a non-admin `accessCp` user, sent injected `criteria[where]` predicates to the element search endpoint, and recovered the full random admin username `victim8abe4fa3` from the database as a blind boolean oracle.
